overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a medieval European town at night, carrying a lantern. The character passes through narrow alleys, under stone archways, and into open town squares, encountering other NPCs with torches. The scene features historic stone architecture and is lit by warm torchlight against a dark night sky.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow medieval alley between tall stone buildings, passing a guard holding a torch on the left. Wooden scaffolding is visible on the left building as the character approaches a large stone archway entrance ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stone archway tunnel, leaving the open alley behind. The tunnel is narrow with rough stone walls and a curved ceiling, lit only by the character's lantern. The character walks toward the distant light at the tunnel exit.

segments.scene_description: The character exits the tunnel into a wide open town square under a clear night sky. Medieval houses line both sides of the square, and other NPCs with lanterns are visible walking through the area. The character continues forward through the cobblestone square.

scene_state.functional_zone: town street with wooden cart and wall-mounted lanterns

agents.ego_description: continuing down the town street, passing a wooden cart and approaching more buildings

notable_agents.action: townsfolk walking ahead carrying a lantern

entered.detail: wooden wagon cart parked on the right side of the street
wall-mounted lantern casting warm light on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a town street lined with medieval buildings, passing a wooden cart parked on the right. Wall-mounted lanterns provide additional warm lighting as the character continues deeper into the historic town center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic medieval alleyway through a dark tunnel and into a sprawling, lit town center. It begins by following a character past a torch-bearing guard and wooden scaffolding in a narrow stone alley, moving steadily toward a looming archway. As the character enters the archway, the environment shifts into a confined stone tunnel where the only illumination comes from the character's own lantern. The scene then opens abruptly as the character exits the tunnel into a wide cobblestone square under a clear night sky, surrounded by medieval houses and other NPCs carrying lanterns. Finally, the camera follows the character along a town street past a parked wooden cart, moving deeper into the historic center under the warm glow of wall-mounted lanterns.
